title: Astro Colony
desc: Explore endless Universe and create the most efficient constellation of colonies. Build conveyor systems to automate production. Take care of Astronauts and their needs! Establish new colonies as part of intergalactic simulation.

title: OddFauna: Secret of the Terrabeast
desc: Craft, forage & farm across a whimsical land with new friends in this open world sandbox adventure. What world will you create?

title: Ourlands
desc: Ourlands is a cozy island builder where you handcraft and play around in bespoke little lands and truly explore your creativity. No goals, no management, just vibes.

title: My Little Cafe Nightmare
desc: Brew otherworldly coffee for ghostly patrons in a dark, cozy first-person café. Upgrade your shop, manage supplies, and turn a haunted café into a sanctuary amidst nightmares.

title: Fatekeeper
desc: Venture into a handcrafted world where ruins whisper of past cataclysms. Master the art of sword and sorcery and forge your path with relics, spells and choices that shape who you become in this first-person RPG.

title: Irradiate 235
desc: Discover and automate unique materials. Engineer the machines and tools for your factory. Handle hazardous materials to make explosives and near-limitless energy. Use your own tools to navigate a labyrinth of alien passages and uncover untouched tunnels in this innovative Automation-Metroidvania.

title: Campsite Hustle
desc: Build your own outdoor store and campground in the heart of Red Shore Valley. Set up your shelves, manage your stock, expand your campsite, and take care of every guest. From humble beginnings to a thriving business all in the middle of nature!

title: Arcane Merchant
desc: Open your own shop in the heart of a Medieval Fantasy realm! Stock your shelves with everything from potions and swords to mysterious crystals and legendary artifacts. Set your prices, earn your customers' trust and become the richest merchant in town!

title: Soul Card Duel
desc: A deckbuilder where position and direction make combats more tactical. Flank enemies with 8 attack directions and combine cards to win in any situation. Explore procedural maps, create decks and armor to customize your hero, and forge your legend in the region's grand tournament.

title: Ultra0
desc: Enjoy a simple, easy-to-play pseudo-3D shooter! Upgrade your character with power-ups and take down the approaching monsters before they reach you.

title: I Am Better Than You
desc: Prove you're better than the rest by popping balloons with household items! Control your helium-filled robot and make it clear who’s in charge. Wipe out your opponents and the friendship that binds you because only one can win.

title: Monster Ops 19
desc: Season 2 of Monster Ops! Black Ops soldiers Wraith and Tide know the world is against them, and they can only rely on each other. Two soldiers, forced to go rogue, with a desperate mission. There's no one left they can trust. A NSFW Gay Visual Novel Dating Sim put out in Monthly Episodes!

title: Unlucky Mummy
desc: Unlucky Mummy is an incremental clicker where your task is to open a sarcophagus with a curse on it. Starting with a 25% chance of success, can you find 12 relics in a row to resurrect the mummy?

title: Satisfactory 1.2
desc: Satisfactory update 1.2 brings back Weather to the game! And big changes to wheeled vehicle pathing

title: Ward X
desc: Ward X is a indie horror puzzle game set inside an abandoned hospital that should have stayed forgotten. Navigate twisted halls and solve puzzles as you search for a way out.

title: Battleship Command
desc: Command the mighty Scharnhorst in this immersive WWII naval simulation. Walk her decks in first-person, control gunnery, radar, and navigation, and lead your fleet through the Atlantic, Arctic, and Mediterranean. Battle convoys, outwit enemies, and survive the stormy seas of war.

title: Fortune Mill
desc: An incremental game where you must make $1,000,000 in each room to advance. Throw darts, play scratch-off tickets, unlock automation, and choose upgrades carefully as each room affects all the others. Can you escape the Fortune Mill?
